description_long: This all-terrain vehicle features a robust, angular body with a matte black finish accented by red and white highlights. The open cockpit design includes two brown seats and a simple dashboard, with a small windshield at the front. Large, rugged tires with deep, blocky treads are mounted on red and black rims, providing excellent traction for off-road conditions. The front end is equipped with a white bumper and two round headlights, while the rear section has a flat cargo area and visible engine components. Brass-colored bolts and mechanical details are visible along the sides, emphasizing its utilitarian build. The overall design suggests durability and functionality, suitable for navigating urban parks, construction sites, or rough neighborhood terrain.
description: A rugged, open-cockpit all-terrain vehicle with large block-tread tires, matte black body, and red and white accents. Features include two brown seats, a small windshield, and a utilitarian rear cargo area.
description_view_0: Side view showing the open cockpit, two brown seats, large rear cargo area, and prominent block-tread tires.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the small windshield, white bumper, round headlights, and wide tire stance.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar features to view 0, emphasizing the dashboard and mechanical side details.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the flat cargo area, exposed engine components, and the symmetry of the large tires.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: The tires have a blocky, knobby tread pattern designed for maximum grip on loose or uneven terrain, making them suitable for all-terrain use.
